race.description: Stradbroke Season On Sale Now Handicap
race.comment: LOVEY DOVEY (9) is in a rich vein of form with two wins and two seconds from her past four starts and it's hard to ignore mares when they are in this mood. Hoop Mallyon has been in the saddle for the past three efforts and sticks here. Should be right there when the whips are cracking. Former Victorian PROCHESTER (13) looked good saluting at Eagle Farm in the first run for the new stable before just missing the frame there last time out. Hails from an astute yard and can give backers a sight. MR O'REILLY (14) is an honest commodity who has hit the top-four at his past seven starts and is usually thereabouts. One for the exotics players. LIBERTY PARK (8) is one from one over this track and trip and will be at peak fitness for this. Worth including. SAINT EMILION (5) will find this easier than recent Sydney efforts and can improve sharply without surprising.
